description_long: This object is a cluster of blooming roses with soft, pale lavender petals and lush green foliage. The flowers are arranged at the top of several slender, green stems, each supporting multiple ovate leaves with serrated edges. The petals of the roses are densely layered in a spiral pattern, creating a full, voluminous appearance typical of cultivated rose varieties. The leaves are glossy and dark green, providing a striking contrast to the delicate, pastel-colored blooms. The stems are thin but sturdy, branching out to support the weight of the flowers and leaves. This arrangement is commonly seen in urban parks, gardens, or as decorative landscaping along sidewalks and public spaces.
description: A cluster of pale lavender roses with layered petals and glossy green ovate leaves on slender stems. The flowers are full and voluminous, contrasting with the dark green foliage.
description_view_0: Three prominent lavender rose blooms are visible, with dense foliage and several leaves extending outward.
description_view_1: The cluster of roses is seen more frontally, showing the full face of the central bloom and a dense arrangement of leaves.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the vertical arrangement of the stems and the layered structure of the petals, with fewer blooms visible.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the underside of the leaves and the rear of the flower heads, with stems and foliage more prominent.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a spiral configuration, densely layered and overlapping, forming a rounded, symmetrical bloom typical of hybrid roses.
